Terms / Rights Attached to Equity Shares

The Company has only one class of  Equity Shares. Each holder of Equity Share is entitled to one vote per Share. In the event of liquidation of the Company, the Equity Shareholders will be entitled to receive remaining assets of the Company,  after distribution of all preferential amounts, in proportion to their Shareholding. The Company in the General Meeting may declare dividends,  but no dividend shall exceed the amount recommended by the Board.
